tiers.title: Aether Regent
tiers.description: The living heart of your tower. Keep the Regent off the arena floor.

tiers.title: Aegis Regent
tiers.description: Aether Aegis: +48 vitality and 15% less direct impact damage.

tiers.title: Ascendant Regent
tiers.description: Mending Pulse: repairs the weakest allied block by 10 each turn.
